Selected engineering work

Each project is written for technical recruiters and startup engineering leaders: problem space, stack clarity, and concrete implementation impact before visual polish.

01Security · Zero-knowledge architecture

SecuredVault

Zero-Knowledge Peer-to-Peer File Sharing & Real-time Security System

Flutter Clean Architecture BLoC WebRTC Django AES-256
  • Engineered a zero-knowledge architecture utilizing WebSockets/WebRTC for direct client-to-client encrypted file transfers, ensuring sensitive user data never touches a central server.
  • Implemented robust on-device data privacy by integrating AES-256 encryption for secure local file storage.
  • Developed a SIEM-inspired threat monitoring engine in Django to analyze incoming request metadata and detect/mitigate anomalous access patterns in real time.
GitHub Code Project Visual Demo
02Marketplace · Real-time communication

Agro-Tech Hub

Real-time Agro-Ecosystem Platform for Farmers and Experts

Flutter Django Channels Redis WebSockets Agora SDK FFmpeg
  • Architected a real-time communication framework using Django Channels and Redis WebSockets to handle instant messaging and live data synchronization across hundreds of concurrent clients.
  • Integrated Agora SDK for high-quality, low-latency video and audio calling between agro-experts and farmers.
  • Embedded custom FFmpeg modules on-device to compress high-definition farm media uploads dynamically, cutting user bandwidth consumption and server storage overhead.
GitHub Code
Marketplace, chat, KYC, and video-call workflows.
03Production scale · Education technology

Loksewa Sandhi

High-Traffic Educational Platform & Examination Suite

Flutter Node.js Express MongoDB REST APIs Payment Gateway
  • Scaled and shipped a production mobile application resulting in 1,100+ active downloads on the Google Play Store.
  • Designed a modular, offline-first quiz engine that securely syncs student progress via optimized REST APIs.
  • Integrated reliable local payment gateways to handle seamless, secure micro-transactions for premium mock exams.

04AI/ML · Semantic Search · Resume Automation

VectorCV

Advanced Resume Tailoring & Semantic Job Matching System

Python RAG Dense Vectors Groq Cloud Semantic Search PDF Parsing
  • Engineered a semantic search (RAG) pipeline using local dense vector embeddings to analyze candidate resumes against job descriptions, calculating precise ATS match scores with multi-tiered borderline validation.
  • Automated extraction of formatting and style metadata (fonts, margins, custom line drawings, alignments, spacings) from original PDF resumes, ensuring dynamically generated optimized resumes perfectly replicate the applicant's unique visual branding.
  • Integrated Groq Cloud LLMs to dynamically generate highly tailored CVs and cover letters, resolving borderline matches through intelligent multi-tiered validation for maximum ATS compatibility.
GitHub Code
